title: Senior Software Engineer - DeHaat International Enterprises - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - DeHaat International Enterprises - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DeHaat International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About DeHaat International Enterprises:
DeHaat International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DeHaat International Enterprises!
